title: Last Avatar Drift
objective: Survive a 2-4 minute gauntlet of escalating elemental waves, using the last element you grazed to convert danger into combo points before three hits end the run.

controls.outcome: The Avatar snaps between three sky lanes to avoid incoming hazards.
The Avatar moves between high and low altitude, slipping over rock spikes or under flame arcs.

controls.input: Brush the edge of a telegraphed elemental hazard
controls.outcome: That element becomes your current Avatar form for a few seconds, enabling score-charging passes through matching hazards

steps: Elemental hazards stream in from the horizon: flame arcs, stone pillars, ice lances, and slicing gusts.
You survive by swiping between lanes and altitudes while the pace ramps up every 20 seconds.
The twist: the last element you safely graze becomes your current form, announced by a distinct musical sting and color shift.
While formed, matching hazards can be skimmed for combo charge instead of fully dodged, but every non-matching hit still costs a heart.
Wave mixes get denser and faster until all four elements overlap; the run ends after three hits and your score is saved to the local offline
scoring: Gain points for survival time and near-misses. Passing through hazards that match your current form increases a multiplier up to x8. Swapping into the correct form just before a new wave starts grants a Last-Shift bonus,
tips: Play safe between wave callouts; force a form change only when the next pattern is readable.
Use the audio cues: each element has its own warning sound, and the form-change sting confirms your risk paid off.
High scores come from chaining matched passes through dense waves, not from constant grazing.
